title: Cognitive Behavioral Therapy for Depression: A Meta-Analysis
abstract: This meta-analysis examines the efficacy of cognitive behavioral therapy across 87 randomized controlled trials, finding moderate to large effect sizes for depression treatment.
author: Sarah Mitchell

title: Attachment Theory in Early Childhood Development
abstract: A comprehensive review of Bowlby's attachment theory and its modern applications in understanding parent-child bonding during the first three years of life.
author: James Chen

title: Working Memory Capacity and Fluid Intelligence
abstract: Investigates the relationship between working memory capacity measures and fluid intelligence scores in a sample of 450 university students.
author: Elena Rodriguez

title: Social Identity and Group Behavior in Online Communities
abstract: Explores how social identity theory explains collective behavior patterns in digital communities and social media platforms.
author: Michael Okafor

title: Mindfulness-Based Interventions in K-12 Education
abstract: A systematic review of mindfulness programs implemented in primary and secondary schools and their effects on student well-being and academic performance.
author: Lisa Park

title: Anxiety Disorders in Adolescents: Prevalence and Risk Factors
abstract: National survey data examining the prevalence of anxiety disorders among adolescents aged 12-18 and associated environmental risk factors.
author: David Thompson

title: Mixed Methods Research in Psychology: Best Practices
abstract: Guidelines for designing and conducting mixed methods research studies that integrate qualitative and quantitative approaches effectively.
author: Rachel Kim

title: The Role of Dopamine in Reward Learning
abstract: Neuroimaging study investigating dopaminergic signaling during probabilistic reward learning tasks in healthy adults.
author: Thomas Weber

title: Trauma-Informed Care in Clinical Settings
abstract: Framework for implementing trauma-informed care principles across outpatient mental health clinics serving diverse populations.
author: Angela Foster

title: Peer Relationships and Academic Achievement in Middle School
abstract: Longitudinal study tracking the influence of peer group dynamics on academic motivation and achievement over two school years.
author: Kevin Liu

title: Implicit Bias and Decision Making in Hiring
abstract: Experimental study examining how implicit racial and gender biases affect hiring decisions in simulated workplace scenarios.
author: Nina Patel

title: Language Acquisition in Bilingual Children
abstract: Cross-sectional analysis of vocabulary development and grammatical competence in simultaneous bilingual children aged 2-6 years.
author: Carlos Mendez

title: Burnout Syndrome Among Healthcare Workers Post-Pandemic
abstract: Survey of 2,100 healthcare professionals assessing burnout prevalence, contributing factors, and coping strategies after COVID-19.
author: Emily Watson

title: Replication Crisis in Psychological Science: A Decade Later
abstract: Ten-year retrospective on the replication crisis, evaluating reforms in research practices and their impact on reproducibility.
author: Robert Hayes

title: Emotional Regulation Strategies in Autism Spectrum Disorder
abstract: Qualitative study of emotion regulation techniques used by adults with ASD and their perceived effectiveness in daily life.
author: Hannah Brooks

title: Theory of Mind Development in Preschoolers
abstract: Experimental investigation of false-belief task performance in preschool children and its correlation with executive function skills.
author: Sophie Laurent

title: Sleep Deprivation and Cognitive Performance
abstract: Controlled laboratory study measuring the effects of 24 and 48 hours of sleep deprivation on attention, memory, and decision-making.
author: Daniel Okonkwo

title: Group Conformity in Emergency Evacuation Scenarios
abstract: Field simulation study examining how social conformity influences evacuation behavior during simulated emergency situations.
author: Maria Santos
